fit_reasons: The lab is developer tooling and public-good infrastructure if sanitized and released as open docs/templates.
Existing evidence assets show repeatable local-only gating, traces, and integrity checks.
The project can help builders avoid unsafe account, wallet, bounty, marketplace, and trading actions.
fit_risks: Grant round/domain must be verified immediately before any application.
Private opportunity data and local operator details must be removed before public release.
KYC, Passport, GitHub OAuth, wallet, Allo, and anti-Sybil routes require human approval.
round_fit.target_round_or_domain: Gitcoin Grants developer tooling / infrastructure public-good route

summary: Local Gitcoin grant-fit memo created; no account, identity, wallet, submission, payment, public action, or runtime.
